title: Is There an Epistemological Paradigm Shift Happening?
summary: This interview excerpt discusses a potential epistemological paradigm shift, comparing the current moment to the Enlightenment era. The conversation explores how science and spirituality, which bifurcated after the Enlightenment, may be converging again through unlikely collaborations.

events.description: Reference to Challenger disaster and space missions beginning in the 1980s

key_claims.claim: The Invisible College has Rosicrucian roots
The goal of Rosicrucianism was to marry science and spirit
Many early Enlightenment proponents were also alchemists
A religious studies professor is collaborating with a secret space program mission controller who has worked on missions since the Challenger in the 1980s
